title: CanvasStorm MVP-first direction workflow
objective: Make the primary flow unambiguous: project idea, minimum MVP, direction selection, same-layer expansion, then deeper exploration.

tasks.title: Freeze the product flow contract
tasks.acceptance: The spec names the five user steps and distinguishes same-layer expansion from entering the next layer.

tasks.title: Define the AI response contract
tasks.acceptance: The response schema separates minimum MVP, exploration directions, and child functions.

tasks.title: Implement the MVP-first application flow
tasks.acceptance: A user can start from an idea, see the minimum MVP, choose a direction, and generate nodes under it.

tasks.title: Verify canvas clarity and interaction semantics
tasks.acceptance: Desktop and mobile browser evidence shows readable center content, no node overlap, and distinct same-layer and next-layer actions.

tasks.title: Publish PR evidence
tasks.acceptance: Tests, preview URL, screenshots, risks, and remaining debt are attached to the PR.
